headline: Gold miners slide sharply as bullion extends steep losses on rate fears
summary: Investing.com -- Shares in gold mining companies fell sharply on Monday as bullion dropped to a four-month low, extending steep losses from last week amid escalating Middle East tensions that have fueled inflation concerns and shifted expectations toward higher global interest rates.

content.title: Gold miners slide sharply as bullion extends steep losses on rate fears
content.summary: Investing.com -- Shares in gold mining companies fell sharply on Monday as bullion dropped to a four-month low, extending steep losses from last week amid escalating Middle East tensions that have fueled inflation concerns and shifted expectations toward higher global interest rates.

headline: Newmont, Freeport Stocks Drop. Diving Gold Prices Will Continue to Smash Miners.
summary: Freeport-McMoRan Royal Gold  and  Newmont  all dropped—by 3.4%, 3.3% and 7.3%, respectively.  Continuous gold futures  were down 6.9% to $4,257.60 an ounce Monday morning.  The price moves came after President Donald Trump said Saturday that the U.S. would “hit and obliterate” Iranian power plants if Tehran didn’t open the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours.

headline: Newmont, Freeport Stocks Rise. Why Gold Price Is Firmly in the Driver’s Seat.
